---
title: "Mary Isabel Jenner"
---

## Mary Isabel Jenner

**Dates:** (d.1900)

**Maiden name:** (Finlaison)

### Description

sister of [[person:512]Marion Finlaison] and wife of the Rt. Rev. [[person:758]Henry Lascelles Jenner]

### Letters

- Letter from Aug 14 1900

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
